title: AutonomyPolicy
description: Gate behavior policy per autonomy mode. Defines how each gate type is handled under ask/balanced/full autonomy modes. Policy is data, not code — adding a mode is a JSON edit.

modes.description: Policy rules keyed by mode name.

ModePolicy.description: Gate decisions for a single autonomy mode.

clarify_halt.description: How the clarify gate halt is handled.

council_verdict.description: How a council verdict is presented/acted on.

challenge_phase.description: How the challenge phase gate is handled.

destructive_ops.description: How destructive operations (deploy, delete, secrets) are handled. Always 'confirm' across all modes — destructive ops are never auto-approved.
